subject: Fix: Migrate robot framework tooling to Python3
commit_message:
Fix: Migrate robot framework tooling to Python3

Issue-ID: CCSDK-3820
Signed-off-by: Matthew Watkins <mwatkins@linuxfoundation.org>
Change-Id: Iab606938ac6abbb6670bd6324eaa5a3b1594c5e3

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/ccsdk-distribution-review-verification-maven-master/321/ : FAILURE

Unable to build due to a non-resolvable parent POM. Search logs for "[FATAL] Non-resolvable parent POM" to find the logs.

The fix for this is usually to make sure your poms are pointing to parents that exist. Double check:

 * groupId is correct and no typos
 * artifactId is correct and no typos
 * version is correct for branch ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/ccsdk-distribution-review-verification-maven-master/321/ )
